ddls:
CREATE TABLE "planning_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planning application */,
  "organisation_uri" TEXT /* URI of the organisation submitting the application */,
  "organisation_label" TEXT /* Label of the organisation submitting the application */,
  "site_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the site */,
  "site_name_address" TEXT /* Name and address of the site */,
  "siteplan_url" TEXT /* URL of the site plan */,
  "coordinate_reference_system" TEXT /* Coordinate reference system used for the site */,
  "geo_x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the site */,
  "geo_y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the site */,
  "easting" INTEGER /* Easting coordinate of the site */,
  "northing" INTEGER /* Northing coordinate of the site */,
  "hectares" REAL /* Size of the site in hectares */,
  "ownership_status" TEXT /* Ownership status of the site */,
  "deliverable" TEXT /* Whether the site is deliverable */,
  "planning_status" TEXT /* Status of the planning application */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission granted */,
  "permission_date" TEXT /* Date permission was granted */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of application (residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "application_fee" REAL /* Fee paid for the application */,
  "status_change_date" TEXT /* Date when the last status change occurred */,
  "status_change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the last status change */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector assigned to the application */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date the last inspection was conducted */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the last inspection */,
  "certificate_of_occupancy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the certificate of occupancy */,
  "certificate_issued_date" TEXT /* Date the certificate of occupancy was issued */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer */,
  "architect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the architect */,
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engineer */,
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contractor */,
  "hazardous_substance_ids" TEXT /* IDs of hazardous substances involved */,
  "public_comment_allowed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if public comments are allowed */,
  "public_comment_close_date" TEXT /* Date when public comments will close */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_planning_applications_organisation_uri FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_uri") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_uri"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_planning_applications_site_reference FOREIGN KEY ("site_reference") REFERENCES sites ("site_reference")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisations" (
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organisation */,
  "organisation_uri" TEXT /* URI of the organisation */,
  "organisation_label" TEXT /* Label of the organisation */,
  "organisation_type" TEXT /* Type of organisation (public, private, non-profit) */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organisation */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organisation */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the organisation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the site */,
  "site_name_address" TEXT /* Name and address of the site */,
  "siteplan_url" TEXT /* URL of the site plan */,
  "coordinate_reference_system" TEXT /* Coordinate reference system used for the site */,
  "geo_x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the site */,
  "geo_y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the site */,
  "easting" INTEGER /* Easting coordinate of the site */,
  "northing" INTEGER /* Northing coordinate of the site */,
  "hectares" REAL /* Size of the site in hectares */,
  "ownership_status" TEXT /* Ownership status of the site */,
  "zone" TEXT /* Zoning classification of the site */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Current land use of the site */,
  "environmental_assessment_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if an environmental assessment is required */,
  "environmental_assessment_result" TEXT /* Result of the environmental assessment */,
  "public_accessibility" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the site is publicly accessible */,
  "site_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last site inspection */,
  "site_inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the last site inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "planning_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "status_color" TEXT /* Color code for the status (for UI purposes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permission_types" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission type */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission type */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission type */,
  "validity_period" INTEGER /* Duration for which the permission is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hazardous_substances" (
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substance */,
  "substance_name" TEXT /* Name of the substance */,
  "substance_description" TEXT /* Description of the substance */,
  "safety_precautions" TEXT /* Safety precautions required for handling the substance */,
  "regulatory_requirements" TEXT /* Regulatory requirements for the substance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the planning application */,
  "permission_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission type */,
  "permission_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was granted */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission is due for renewal */,
  "renewal_fee" REAL /* Fee for renewing the permission */,
  "issued_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who issued the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_permission_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_type_id") REFERENCES permission_types ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES planning_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_permissions" (
  "site_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site permission */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the site permission is due for renewal */,
  "renewal_fee" REAL /* Fee for renewing the site permission */,
  "issued_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who issued the site permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_permissions_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "development_descriptions" (
  "description_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each description */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the planning application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the development */,
  "development_type" TEXT /* Type of development (residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  "development_area" REAL /* Area of the development in square meters */,
  "development_height" REAL /* Height of the development in meters */,
  "development_materials" TEXT /* Materials used in the development */,
  "development_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the development on the surrounding area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_development_descriptions_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES planning_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "non_housing_developments" (
  "development_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each development */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the planning application */,
  "development" TEXT /* Description of the non-housing development */,
  "development_type" TEXT /* Type of non-housing development */,
  "development_area" REAL /* Area of the non-housing development in square meters */,
  "development_height" REAL /* Height of the non-housing development in meters */,
  "development_materials" TEXT /* Materials used in the non-housing development */,
  "development_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the non-housing development on the surrounding area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("development_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_non_housing_developments_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES planning_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organisation the user belongs to */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the planning application */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date the comment was submitted */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (support, objection, general) */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is anonymous */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES planning_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_comments" (
  "site_comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site comment */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is anonymous */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_comments_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_comments_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "planning_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planning history */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the planning application */,
  "history" TEXT /* Text of the planning history */,
  "history_type" TEXT /* Type of history (status change, document submission, inspection) */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date when the history event occurred */,
  "history_description" TEXT /* Description of the history event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_planning_history_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES planning_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proposed_for_pip" (
  "pip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PIP proposal */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the planning application */,
  "proposed" TEXT /* Whether the application is proposed for PIP */,
  "pip_reason" TEXT /* Reason for proposing the application for PIP */,
  "pip_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was proposed for PIP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposed_for_pip_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES planning_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "net_dwellings" (
  "dwellings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each net dwellings */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the planning application */,
  "net_dwellings" INTEGER /* Number of net dwellings */,
  "dwelling_type" TEXT /* Type of dwellings (single, multi-unit) */,
  "dwelling_area" REAL /* Area of each dwelling in square meters */,
  "dwelling_height" REAL /* Height of each dwelling in meters */,
  "dwelling_materials" TEXT /* Materials used in each dwelling */,
  "dwelling_impact" TEXT /* Impact of each dwelling on the surrounding area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dwellings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_net_dwellings_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES planning_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "development_description_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "description_id" INTEGER /* ID of the development description */,
  "document" TEXT /* Text of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (plan, report, certificate) */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_development_description_documents_description_id FOREIGN KEY ("description_id") REFERENCES development_descriptions ("description_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "non_housing_development_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "development_id" INTEGER /* ID of the non-housing development */,
  "document" TEXT /* Text of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (plan, report, certificate) */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_non_housing_development_documents_development_id FOREIGN KEY ("development_id") REFERENCES non_housing_developments ("development_id")
)
